ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transact_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transact_no" TEXT /* Unique transaction number */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the traded asset */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the seller */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "rate" REAL /* Transaction rate per stock */,
  "amount" REAL /* Total transaction amount */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, dividend) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, derivative) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the broker handling the transaction */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the transaction was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* The stock symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the symbol */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_dividend" REAL /* Last dividend paid by the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account the buyer holds */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the buyer joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the buyer's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account the seller holds */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the seller joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the seller's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate record */,
  "transact_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the transaction */,
  "rate" REAL /* Transaction rate at the time of the transaction */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the rate was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rate data */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_rates_transact_id FOREIGN KEY ("transact_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_amounts" (
  "amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amount record */,
  "transact_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Transaction amount at the time of the transaction */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the amount was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction amount */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the amount data */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the amount data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_amounts_transact_id FOREIGN KEY ("transact_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock symbol */,
  "current_rate" REAL /* Current trading rate of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in rate */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the market data */,
  "high_rate" REAL /* Highest trading rate of the day */,
  "low_rate" REAL /* Lowest trading rate of the day */,
  "open_rate" REAL /* Opening trading rate of the day */,
  "close_rate" REAL /* Closing trading rate of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account the user holds */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock symbol */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, volume change) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the stock symbol */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news item */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date when the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news item */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "transact_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the transaction */,
  "compliance_check" TEXT /* Description of the compliance check performed */,
  "date_checked" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the transaction passed the compliance check */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the compliance check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the person or system that performed the compliance check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_transact_id FOREIGN KEY ("transact_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transact_id")
)
